components.responsibility: Main HTML entry point of the application. Defines the page structure, welcome header, and connects scripts and styles.
change_when: page layout or HTML structure must be updated
new UI elements must be added
CSS or JS files must be connected or removed

components.responsibility: Contains general JavaScript behavior for the page, including interactive and dynamic UI updates.
change_when: new UI behavior must be added
existing event handling must be updated

components.responsibility: Contains general JavaScript behavior for the page, including interactive and dynamic UI updates.
change_when: new UI behavior must be added
existing event handling must be updated

components.responsibility: Implements Rainbow button behavior that changes the page background through rainbow colors.
change_when: Rainbow button behavior must be changed
Rainbow button interaction logic must be extended

components.responsibility: Implements Bad Vision button behavior that toggles text size for accessibility.
change_when: Bad Vision button behavior must be changed
accessibility-related font scaling must be adjusted

constraints: HTML structure changes should be made in index.html
visual-only changes should be made in styles.css
feature-specific button logic should stay in its dedicated JS file
new interactive features should be added in a way consistent with the existing separation of concerns
